value.found_quote: Subagents run asynchronously in the background, allowing the parent agent to delegate a task and immediately resume its own work.
value.rationale: The page describes Google Antigravity's subagents feature, which run asynchronously in the background and can be delegated tasks. This substantiates the claim of background tasks & subagents. The core subagent functionality is described as active (pre-packaged built-in subagents, invoke/define tools), though an advanced multi-agent teamwork feature is noted as preview/Ultra-only.
